summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Anima Fund AI-to-AI VC platform. All backend APIs functioning correctly, genesis creation working, frontend fully operational with all 9 dashboard pages, and content verification passed.

minor_issues.issue: Some 404 console errors in frontend when fetching resources
minor_issues.impact: Does not affect functionality but creates console noise

passed_tests: Backend /api/health returns ok with creator_wallet
Backend /api/genesis/status returns not_created when clean
Backend /api/engine/live returns live=false when no engine
Backend /api/engine/status returns 50 skills and 324 genesis lines
Backend /api/constitution returns 12 laws including Law XII Ownership Non-Transferable
Backend all /api/live/* endpoints (22) return empty when engine not running
Backend POST /api/genesis/create successfully builds Automaton and starts engine
Backend after create: /api/genesis/status shows wallet_address starting with 0x and engine_running=true
Backend after create: engine logs show skills loaded, wallet created, identity registered
Frontend Genesis screen shows Create Genesis Agent button when no agent exists
Frontend after creation: shows QR code, wallet address, engine status, creator wallet
Frontend Open Dashboard button navigates to dashboard
Frontend all 9 sidebar items present: Agent Mind, Fund HQ, Agents, Deal Flow, Portfolio, Financials, Activity, Memory, Configuration
Frontend all 9 pages render without errors
Frontend Constitution tab shows Law XII Ownership Non-Transferable
50 skill SKILL.md files exist with valid YAML frontmatter
Constitution has 12 laws including ownership non-transferable
Genesis prompt is 324 lines with creator wallet and survival-first structure
MongoDB completely empty before create (after cleanup)
No tycoon, demoMode, shutdown, or eth_account references found in frontend code
